task: temporal-XOR; measurement-averaging recovery at sigma=0.3 (Batch-6 regime)

config.selection: hyperparams frozen at clean(sigma=0) VAL; readout retrained per (M); M reads averaged before readout, identical for reservoir and linear delay-line

verdict: Recovery at sigma=0.3 (clean margin 0.201): M=1 0.024 -> M=4 0.026 -> M=16 0.040. Averaging does NOT recover the edge even at M=16: the loss is deeper than measurement noise. Single-shot still collapses (control holds). Token M=4 is not enough (dose-response confirmed).
